cases.title: In-window check-in recorded with timestamp per testing-plan §3
preconditions: Event is InProgress with check-in window active (fixed clock now between checkinOpenAt and checkinCloseAt)
Registered participant with no prior valid check-in
Authenticated OrganizerStaff or OrganizerAdmin with check-in capability for the event
steps: Invoke checkinService.staffCheckin(eventId, { registrationId }, actorContext) at fixed in-window time
Query checkin_records and registration state for the participant
cases.expected: Testing-plan §3 in-window row satisfied: CheckinRecord persisted with non-null checkinAt; registration transitions to CheckedIn; only valid in-window check-ins recorded per FR-15 and BR-10

cases.title: Out-of-window check-in rejected with code per testing-plan §3
preconditions: Event is InProgress with configured check-in window not containing fixed clock now
Registered participant with no prior check-in
Authenticated staff actor with check-in capability for the event
steps: Set fixed clock to a time outside checkinOpenAt..checkinCloseAt
Invoke checkinService.staffCheckin(eventId, { registrationId }, actorContext)
Inspect error code and database state
cases.expected: Testing-plan §3 out-of-window row satisfied: check-in rejected with stable error code CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED; no CheckinRecord persisted; registration remains Registered per FR-15

cases.title: Staff check-in module persists record only when current time is inside configured window
preconditions: Event InProgress with active check-in window
Registered participant with no prior valid check-in
Authenticated OrganizerStaff assigned to the event
steps: Invoke checkinService.staffCheckin(eventId, { registrationId }, staffActorContext) at fixed in-window time against real Postgres
Query checkin_records and registration state in the same database session
cases.expected: CheckinRecord persisted with non-null checkinAt and method Staff; registration transitions to CheckedIn in one transaction; window validation passed before persist per check-in module guardrails

cases.title: Self check-in module persists record only when current time is inside configured window
preconditions: Event rule config enables participant self check-in
Event InProgress with active check-in window
Registered participant with no prior valid check-in
Authenticated participant actor context
steps: Invoke checkinService.selfCheckin(eventId, participantActorContext) at fixed in-window time against real Postgres
Query checkin_records and registration state in the same database session
cases.expected: CheckinRecord persisted with non-null checkinAt and method Self; registration transitions to CheckedIn; same window rule enforced for self-service path

cases.title: Valid in-window check-in transitions registration Registered to CheckedIn
preconditions: Registration in Registered state before check-in
Event check-in window contains fixed clock now
No prior valid check-in on the registration
steps: Record beforeState as Registered from registration repository
Submit valid in-window check-in via checkinService
Read afterState from registration repository and CheckinRecord
cases.expected: beforeState Registered, afterState CheckedIn per state machine validCheckin trigger; guard satisfied (in-window, no duplicate); checkinAt timestamp recorded

cases.title: Out-of-window check-in attempt preserves Registered state without transition
preconditions: Registration in Registered state before check-in attempt
Fixed clock now outside checkinOpenAt..checkinCloseAt
No prior valid check-in on the registration
steps: Record beforeState as Registered from registration repository
Submit out-of-window check-in via checkinService
Read afterState from registration repository and count CheckinRecord rows
cases.expected: beforeState Registered, afterState Registered per invalid-transition policy; validCheckin guard fails on window; no CheckedIn transition occurs

cases.title: POST /events/{eventId}/checkins returns HTTP 200 when inside configured window
preconditions: E2E fixture event InProgress with active check-in window
Registered participant with valid registrationId
OrganizerStaff JWT scoped to the event
Fresh Idempotency-Key header value
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/checkins with body { registrationId } and staff Authorization bearer token while in window
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/attendance?page=1&pageSize=20 and locate the participant row
cases.expected: POST returns HTTP 200 with non-null checkinAt, registrationState CheckedIn, and method Staff; attendance list includes participant with matching checkinAt

cases.title: POST /events/{eventId}/self-checkin returns HTTP 200 when inside configured window
preconditions: Event rule config enables participant self check-in
Event InProgress with active check-in window
Authenticated participant JWT for Registered registration with no prior check-in
Fresh Idempotency-Key header value
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/self-checkin with participant Authorization bearer token while in window
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registration-status for the same participant
cases.expected: POST returns HTTP 200 with non-null checkinAt, registrationState CheckedIn, and method Self; registration-status reflects CheckedIn with matching timestamp

cases.title: POST /events/{eventId}/checkins returns HTTP 422 with CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED when outside window
preconditions: E2E fixture event InProgress with check-in window not containing current (or simulated) time
Registered participant with valid registrationId
Staff JWT with scope for the event
Fresh Idempotency-Key header value
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/checkins with body { registrationId } while outside the configured window
Parse error envelope from response body
cases.expected: HTTP 422 with error.code CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED and user-safe message per error contract; no CheckinRecord created; registration remains Registered

cases.title: POST /events/{eventId}/self-checkin returns HTTP 422 with CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED when outside window
preconditions: Event rule config enables participant self check-in
Event InProgress but current time is outside checkinOpenAt..checkinCloseAt
Authenticated participant JWT for Registered registration with no prior check-in
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/self-checkin with participant Authorization bearer token
Inspect response status, error.code, and registration-status endpoint
cases.expected: HTTP 422 with error.code CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED; registration remains Registered; no checkinAt returned

cases.title: Flow A lifecycle check-in step succeeds only when inside configured window
preconditions: E2E Flow A fixture: event progressed through publish, open-registration, and participant Registered
Event started (InProgress) with check-in window open
Participant or staff token from prior registration step
steps: Execute Flow A check-in step: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/self-checkin or staff checkins while in window
Verify response before proceeding to feedback step
cases.expected: Check-in step succeeds with HTTP 200, non-null checkinAt, and CheckedIn state; FR-15 satisfied — only valid in-window check-in recorded enabling subsequent lifecycle steps

cases.title: Flow A lifecycle blocks check-in step when outside configured window
preconditions: E2E Flow A fixture: event progressed through publish, open-registration, and participant Registered
Event started (InProgress) but fixed clock is outside check-in window
Participant or staff token from prior registration step
steps: Execute Flow A check-in step: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/self-checkin or staff checkins while window is closed
Attempt to proceed to feedback step
cases.expected: Check-in step fails with CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED; registration remains Registered; no valid check-in recorded per FR-15

cases.title: Organizer staff check-in console blocks action when window is closed
preconditions: OrganizerStaff logged in with assigned event scope
Event InProgress but check-in window closed
Target participant in Registered state listed in console
steps: Open organizer check-in operations console for the event
Attempt staff check-in for a registered participant while window is closed
Observe error or disabled control feedback and participant row state
cases.expected: Console prevents successful check-in and surfaces window-closed policy to staff; participant row remains unchecked-in; no success timestamp displayed

cases.title: Participant self check-in UI shows window-closed feedback when outside window
preconditions: Event with self check-in enabled
Current time outside configured check-in window
Participant logged in with Registered status for the event
steps: Navigate to event self check-in page
Attempt check-in action or observe disabled state and messaging
Confirm no success timestamp is displayed
cases.expected: UI communicates that check-in is unavailable (window closed or not yet open) with actionable messaging; participant remains not checked in per FR-15

cases.title: Staff check-in before checkinOpenAt is rejected with CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED
preconditions: Event InProgress with checkinOpenAt in the future relative to fixed clock now
Registered participant with no prior check-in
Authenticated OrganizerStaff assigned to the event
steps: Set fixed clock to a time strictly before checkinOpenAt
Invoke checkinService.staffCheckin(eventId, { registrationId }, staffActorContext)
Query checkin_records and registration state
cases.expected: Request fails with CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED; no CheckinRecord persisted; registration remains Registered

cases.title: Staff check-in after checkinCloseAt is rejected with CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED
preconditions: Event InProgress or Completed with checkinCloseAt in the past relative to fixed clock now
Registered participant with no prior check-in
Authenticated staff actor with check-in capability
steps: Set fixed clock to a time strictly after checkinCloseAt
Invoke checkinService.staffCheckin(eventId, { registrationId }, actorContext)
Verify database state for check-in and registration
cases.expected: Request fails with CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED; no CheckinRecord created; registration state unchanged (Registered)

cases.title: Check-in at checkinOpenAt boundary instant is recorded when open boundary is inclusive
preconditions: Event configured with known checkinOpenAt and checkinCloseAt
Fixed clock set exactly to checkinOpenAt
Registered participant with no prior check-in
steps: Submit staff or self check-in at the open boundary instant
Query CheckinRecord and registration state
cases.expected: Check-in succeeds per configured window policy; checkinAt persisted and registration is CheckedIn

cases.title: Check-in at checkinCloseAt boundary instant is rejected when close boundary is exclusive
preconditions: Event configured with known checkinOpenAt and checkinCloseAt
Fixed clock set exactly to checkinCloseAt
Registered participant with no prior check-in
steps: Submit staff or self check-in at the close boundary instant
Query CheckinRecord and registration state
cases.expected: Check-in rejected with CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED per strictly-inside window semantics; registration stays Registered

cases.title: Rejected out-of-window check-in leaves no valid record for attendance reconciliation
preconditions: Event InProgress with closed check-in window (now after checkinCloseAt)
Registered participant never checked in
Event completion workflow available in test harness
steps: Attempt and fail check-in outside window
Complete event and run attendance finalization
Inspect registration terminal state
cases.expected: No valid CheckinRecord exists; participant without in-window check-in is marked Absent after completion, not Attended per BR-12

cases.title: Concurrent out-of-window check-in requests all fail without creating records
preconditions: Registered participant with no prior check-in
Check-in window closed (fixed clock outside bounds)
Two or more parallel check-in requests for the same registrationId
steps: Fire concurrent staffCheckin (or API POST checkins) calls while window is closed
Count checkin_records rows and inspect registration state after all requests settle
cases.expected: All requests fail with CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED; zero CheckinRecord rows created; registration remains Registered

cases.title: Idempotent retry while window remains closed does not record check-in
preconditions: Registered participant with check-in window closed
Fixed Idempotency-Key header value for check-in write endpoint
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/checkins with Idempotency-Key K; receive CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED failure
Repeat POST with same Idempotency-Key K while window remains closed
cases.expected: Both responses fail with CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED; no CheckinRecord created; time-window policy requires user action rather than blind retry success

cases.title: Failed window validation does not partially persist CheckinRecord or transition registration
preconditions: Database transaction boundary for check-in module validates window before persist
Registered participant with no prior check-in and closed check-in window
steps: Attempt out-of-window check-in that fails at window validation step
Query checkin_records and registration state in same database session
cases.expected: No orphaned CheckinRecord and no registration state change; transaction rolled back preserving check-in module invariants

cases.title: CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED error includes configured window bounds in details
preconditions: Event with known checkinOpenAt and checkinCloseAt ISO timestamps
Out-of-window check-in attempt via staff or self API endpoint
steps: POST check-in endpoint outside configured window
Inspect error.error.details in response envelope
cases.expected: HTTP 422 (or 409) with error.code CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED, user-safe message, and details containing checkinOpenAt and checkinCloseAt per error-handling contract

cases.title: Window validation runs before duplicate-check-in check in check-in pipeline
preconditions: Check-in validation pipeline order: auth, event check-in window, existing valid check-in check, persist
Registered participant with no prior check-in
Fixed clock outside check-in window
steps: Attempt check-in with out-of-window now
Inspect error code returned
cases.expected: Failure is CHECKIN_WINDOW_CLOSED (not CHECKIN_ALREADY_RECORDED); window rule evaluated at pipeline step 2 before duplicate check at step 3

cases.title: Self check-in UI disables primary action at checkinCloseAt when API excludes close instant
preconditions: Event rule config enables participant self check-in
Event InProgress with known checkinOpenAt and checkinCloseAt
Fixed clock set exactly to checkinCloseAt
Participant logged in with Registered registration and no prior check-in
steps: Navigate to event self check-in page
Inspect primary check-in control state and any blocking message
Attempt check-in if control is visible
cases.expected: canSelfCheckIn returns false; primary check-in button is disabled or hidden; UI does not show success path when API policy rejects at close boundary; participant remains not checked in
